Accessibility Smoke Tests › Dashboard should not have automatically detectable accessibility issues

Agent Registration › shows registered worker in dashboard

Agents Panel › show proposal controls on agent panel

property.value: Assistant dock could not be expanded in this environment.

testcase.name: AI Snake Config Panel Persistence › persists backend config value across reads
AI Snake Session Sharing › creates and joins session via invite code

MFA Flow › should enable and disable MFA

property.name: skip
property.value: MFA setup returned a masked secret in this environment.

testcase.name: Password Change › should change password and login with new password
Auth Rate Limit › too many attempts returns rate limit error
Auth › invalid login shows error
Auth › login and logout redirects to login
Auth › session persists after reload
Auth › accessing protected route without login redirects to login
Auto-Planner › displays auto-planner page
Auto-Planner › shows status cards
Auto-Planner › has configuration form
Auto-Planner › has goal input form
Auto-Planner › can enter goal text
Auto-Planner › plan button is disabled without goal
Auto-Planner › plan button enables with goal text
Auto-Planner › shows advanced goal fields on demand
Auto-Planner › renders goal detail drilldown panels
Webhooks › displays webhooks page
Webhooks › shows status cards
Webhooks › shows webhook URLs
Webhooks › shows test form
Webhooks › can test webhook
Webhooks › shows GitHub integration guide
Config + UI Control Hardening › settings enforces validation and persists system+quality controls
Config + UI Control Hardening › template creation controls in UI persist reliably to API
Config + UI Control Hardening › auto-planner config and advanced goal steering are end-to-end controllable
Control Center denied flow › shows denied tool call in timeline and policy log without manual polling
Control Center Policy View › shows denied actions and narrow approval payload
Control Center review flow › opens artifacts area and shows verification linkage
First Goal E2E › uses local LLM, creates subtasks, assigns to team members, and monitors execution

testcase.name: Hub Flow › create task and execute via hub locally (no worker assignment)
Lite Compose Connectivity › frontend can reach hub and worker agents
Live click critical paths › clicks dashboard, goal start and result reading path with stable selectors
Live click critical paths › surfaces blocked quick-goal submission and recovers on retry
LLM Config › switch provider and save LM Studio mode
LLM Config › save codex provider defaults
LLM Config › saves per-agent context_limit and shows catalog context lengths
LLM Generate › shows assistant response from LLM
LLM Generate › shows error toast on empty response
LLM Generate › requires confirmation for tool calls
LLM Generate › runs confirmed tool plan and sends confirm payload
Main Goal Execution Journey › runs goal-derived tasks with two workers and exposes progress in UI
Main Goal UI Foundation › canonical UI control points are present
Main Goal UI Foundation › foundation journey creates template + blueprint + team with two workers via UI

failure.message: main-goal-foundation.spec.ts:81:7 foundation journey creates template + blueprint + team with two workers via UI

testcase.failure:

Main Goal Observability Journey › covers artifacts controls with deterministic API interactions
Main Goal UI Planning › plans goal via UI with explicit team mapping
Notifications › does not submit invalid raw config
Permissions › non-admin cannot manage templates, roles, or team types

property.name: skip
property.value: Set E2E_AUTH_MODE=oidc-ui to run the public OIDC/WebRTC smoke test.

Settings Config › keeps API/UI config roundtrip consistent across refresh and reload

Stress & Load Tests › Concurrent data loading stress
Stress & Load Tests › Heavy component interaction

property.name: skip
property.value: Archived table rows still not rendered in compose E2E despite mocked /tasks/archived responses; follow-up task open.

Terminal › terminal is reachable for hub alpha and beta

UI UX console and visibility › error notification is visible in viewport and closeable
UI UX console and visibility › templates form stays editable when usage lookups fail
UI UX console and visibility › dashboard, templates, and teams settle without stuck loading states

UI UX Workflows › template creation works via UI and remains responsive
UI UX Workflows › blueprint + team creation works via UI
UI UX Workflows › teams page unlocks even when one backend call hangs

WebRTC DataChannel Protocol › reassembles chunked payloads
